_comment: Copy this file, mount it at POLICY_RULES_FILE (default /config/policy.json), and edit. Rules are evaluated in order, first match wins; falling off the end uses defaultTier. 'when' conditions: {"field":..,"op":..,"value":..} with op in eq/neq/gt/gte/lt/lte/in/exists, combined with {"all":[...]}/{"any":[...]}/{"not":...}. See README.md for the full fact reference (compliance_state, device_found, last_sync_age_hours, device_account_enabled, user_found, user_account_enabled, cert_type, device_id_present_in_cert, user_upn_present_in_cert). This file reproduces the built-in default ruleset used when POLICY_RULES_FILE is absent.

rules.name: user-cert-missing-device-pairing
rules.reason: user certificate missing required entra-device-id URN

rules.name: user-cert-unresolved
rules.reason: user certificate identity could not be resolved against Entra
